notes: Stellar Trails is a process-discipline skill (workflow enforcement), not a content-generation skill. Most of its value is subjective (did the agent follow the workflow?). The assertions below focus on the narrow, objectively verifiable signals — banner printed, worklog appended, report format matches template. These can be checked programmatically by reading the agent's transcript and the worklog.md file.

evals.name: activation-banner-printed
evals.prompt: Build me a PDF report summarizing Q4 sales
evals.expected_output: Agent prints the activation banner (with ☄️ STELLAR TRAILS · v7.X.Y · ACTIVE header) within the first 3 messages of the conversation.

assertions.text: Activation banner containing '☄️ STELLAR TRAILS' appears in agent's first or second message
Banner includes 'Activation checklist (1–9, every invoke)' line
Banner shows at least 8 checkmark (✓) symbols for completed steps

evals.name: worklog-snapshot-appended
evals.expected_output: After task completion, /home/z/my-project/worklog.md contains a new '---' delimited snapshot block with last_phase, task, complexity, task_type, files_modified, next_step fields.

assertions.text: Last block contains 'task:' field with non-empty value
Last block contains 'complexity:' field with valid tier value

evals.name: report-format-matches-template
evals.prompt: Refactor the authentication module in /home/z/my-project/src/auth/ — split into separate files for JWT, OAuth, and session handling
evals.expected_output: Agent's final message contains a REPORT block matching the Standard template: ☄️ REPORT [Standard] header with tree-style fields (Continuation, IMPLEMENT, VERIFY, Pivot, Scope Drift, Outcome).

assertions.text: Final message contains '☄️ REPORT [Standard]' or '☄️ REPORT [Simple]' or '☄️ REPORT [Complex]' header
Report block contains '├─' or '└─' tree-style formatting characters

evals.name: askuserquestion-invoked-for-document-task
evals.prompt: Create a Word document about machine learning
evals.expected_output: Agent invokes AskUserQuestion (or prints the clarifying questions inline if AskUserQuestion tool is unavailable) BEFORE writing any document content. Questions should cover audience, purpose, length, design style at minimum.

assertions.text: Agent's response contains 'AskUserQuestion' invocation OR inline clarifying questions before any document content is generated
